name: Cameo 62.5" Floor Lamp - FLL4102 - Walnut - Safavieh
description: Enhance your living space with the Cameo floor lamp. Standing tall at 62.5 inches, this piece combines the warmth of walnut wood with the strength of iron. Its elegant design is both contemporary and timeless, making it a versatile addition to any room. The sturdy structure ensures both form and function, while the wood finish adds a touch of nature and sophistication to your decor. Perfect for reading nooks or highlighting your favorite space, the Cameo floor lamp illuminates with style and grace. Whether you are creating a cozy corner or adding a focal point, this lamp is designed to complement your space beautifully. Embrace the blend of wood and iron to light up your life.
